import React from 'react'; import './Team.css'; const TEAM = [ { name: 'Aakash Mehta', role: 'CEO & Co-Founder', img: 'https://randomuser.me/api/portraits/men/32.jpg', bio: 'IIT Delhi alumnus with 12+ years in energy & logistics. Visionary behind FuelDrop.' }, { name: 'Priya Sharma', role: 'COO & Co-Founder', img: 'https://randomuser.me/api/portraits/women/44.jpg', bio: 'Ex-Amazon operations leader. Ensures every delivery happens on time, every time.' }, { name: 'Rahul Gupta', role: 'CTO', img: 'https://randomuser.me/api/portraits/men/45.jpg', bio: 'Built the IoT & cloud platform that powers real-time fuel tracking.' }, { name: 'Sunita Verma', role: 'VP Sales', img: 'https://randomuser.me/api/portraits/women/22.jpg', bio: 'Grew our B2B customer base from 0 to 55,000+ in under 5 years.' }, { name: 'Deepak Nair', role: 'VP Technology', img: 'https://randomuser.me/api/portraits/men/56.jpg', bio: 'Leads our mobile app and web platform development teams.' }, { name: 'Kavya Reddy', role: 'Head of Operations', img: 'https://randomuser.me/api/portraits/women/55.jpg', bio: 'Manages 300+ delivery professionals across all cities.' }, { name: 'Arjun Singh', role: 'Head of Finance', img: 'https://randomuser.me/api/portraits/men/61.jpg', bio: 'CA with experience in Deloitte. Ensuring FuelDrop grows sustainably.' }, { name: 'Meera Iyer', role: 'Head of Marketing', img: 'https://randomuser.me/api/portraits/women/67.jpg', bio: 'Behind every campaign that made FuelDrop a household name in B2B fuel.' }, ]; export default function Team({ navigate }) { return (
Our Team

The People Behind FuelDrop

A passionate team of engineers, operators, and fuel industry experts united by one mission.

{TEAM.map((m, i) => (

{m.name}

{m.role}

{m.bio}

))}
); }
